title: ATAC-seq Protocol for Astrocytes
author: Elena Coccia
materials: Tagmented DNA purified with Minelute PCR Purification Kit (Qiagen, Cat. #28004)
Nuclei isolated by cell lysis and cytosol removal
Cell viability and quantification assessed using a Countess Automated Cell Counter (ThermoFisher Scientific)

steps.title: Centrifuge at 1,000 × g for...
steps.instruction: Centrifuge at 1,000 × g for 5 minutes, all steps kept on ice

steps.title: Ship pelleted cells to Azenta/GENEWIZ for library preparation and sequencing
steps.instruction: Ship pelleted cells to Azenta/GENEWIZ for library preparation and sequencing

steps.title: Raw
steps.instruction: Raw .bcl files converted to FASTQ and demultiplexed using bcl2fastq 2.17 (1 mismatch allowed)

steps.title: Quality control and adapter/low-quality base trimming with Trimmomatic 0
steps.instruction: Quality control and adapter/low-quality base trimming with Trimmomatic 0.38

steps.title: Alignment to reference genome GRCh38 using bowtie2
steps.instruction: Alignment to reference genome GRCh38 using bowtie2

steps.title: Filtering with samtools 1.9
steps.instruction: Filtering with samtools 1.9: minimum mapping quality ≥ 30, concordantly aligned, primary alignments only

steps.title: Mitochondrial reads and unplaced contig reads...
steps.instruction: Mitochondrial reads and unplaced contig reads removed prior to peak calling

steps.title: Libraries barcoded with Nextera Index Kit v2 (Illumina, Cat
steps.instruction: Libraries barcoded with Nextera Index Kit v2 (Illumina, Cat. #FC-131-2001) and amplified by PCR, followed by SPRI bead cleanup

steps.title: Nuclei tagmented with Tn5 enzyme (Illumina, Cat
steps.instruction: Nuclei tagmented with Tn5 enzyme (Illumina, Cat. #20034197) for 30 min at 37°C

steps.title: Live cell samples thawed, washed, and...
steps.instruction: Live cell samples thawed, washed, and treated with DNase I (Life Tech, Cat. #EN0521) to remove genomic DNA contamination

steps.title: Pairwise comparisons
steps.instruction: Pairwise comparisons: peaks from both conditions merged; reads under peaks counted

steps.title: Peaks present in ≥ 66% of...
steps.instruction: Peaks present in ≥ 66% of samples per group retained for downstream analysis

steps.title: Peak calling with MACS2 2
steps.instruction: Peak calling with MACS2 2.1.2 to identify open chromatin regions
